Class BaseCreature

java.lang.Object
logic.base.BaseCreature
Direct Known Subclasses:
Monster, Player
public abstract class BaseCreature extends Object
Abstract base class for all creatures in the game (players and monsters). Manages core combat stats: health, attack, and defense.

  • Field Details

    • healthPoint

      protected int healthPoint

    • maxHealthPoint

      protected int maxHealthPoint

    • attack

      protected int attack

    • defense

      protected int defense

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseCreature

      public BaseCreature(int maxHealthPoint, int attack, int defense)
      Creates a new creature with the given stats. Health is initialized to the max value.
      Parameters:
      maxHealthPoint - the maximum (and starting) health points
      attack - the base attack power
      defense - the base defense value

  • Method Details

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Returns whether this creature is still alive.
      Returns:
      true if health points are greater than zero

    • takeDamage

      public void takeDamage(int damage)
      Reduces this creature's health by the given damage minus its defense. Health will not go below zero.
      Parameters:
      damage - the incoming damage before defense reduction

    • heal

      public void heal(int amount)
      Restores health by the given amount, capped at max health.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of health to restore

    • getHealthPoint

      public int getHealthPoint()
      Returns the current health points.
      Returns:
      current HP

    • setHealthPoint

      public void setHealthPoint(int v)
      Sets the current health points directly.
      Parameters:
      v - the new health value

    • getMaxHealthPoint

      public int getMaxHealthPoint()
      Returns the maximum health points.
      Returns:
      max HP

    • setMaxHealthPoint

      public void setMaxHealthPoint(int v)
      Sets the maximum health points.
      Parameters:
      v - the new max HP value

    • getAttack

      public int getAttack()
      Returns the base attack power.
      Returns:
      attack stat

    • setAttack

      public void setAttack(int v)
      Sets the attack power.
      Parameters:
      v - the new attack value

    • getDefense

      public int getDefense()
      Returns the defense value used to reduce incoming damage.
      Returns:
      defense stat

    • setDefense

      public void setDefense(int v)
      Sets the defense value.
      Parameters:
      v - the new defense value

    • attack

      public abstract void attack(BaseCreature target)
      Performs an attack on the target creature.
      Parameters:
      target - the creature to attack
